textByHash.7a3b4628071aeb006f4ebfd0fe092003f678b19e: I could, but you don't appear to actually need healing right now.
textByHash.99f192e2ac58bf89a2bd49ea96b9cb4f4d339654: I am a nelta in service to Ralos.
textByHash.778715edd8776b97ce31cb0aee32674344f49b71: We are the faithful servants of Ralos. We serve in a variety of roles across the Church of Ralos.
textByHash.352f88de629adab5661324fbb35496d61ae82b5b: Yes, I believe that would be the closest comparison to the Church of Saradomin, though I am no expert on their practices.
textByHash.47117356b7947e29c894bc26c7850a78f13179a0: Above us mere neltas are the teoki, leaders of the key temples across the kingdom. And of course, above them you have the Teokan himself.
textByHash.35bd1d9bfb7e1cca2501d2713db12f42a2d1f641: This is the Teomat, home to both the Church of Ralos and the Sect of Ranul. The first and only time that Ralos appeared to us, he did so here on Ralos' Rise. The Teomat was built here as a result.
textByHash.d92636aa1b019a1082c2b0f85bc6cf6f1c03b548: May the sun light your way.
